title: Create: Quartz to Experience
description: Create Mod Addon that adds the ability to crush quartz and all related blocks into experience nuggets.
body:
This mod is a Create mod addon that adds a recipe for crushing quartz into experience nuggets. Quartz blocks are able to be uncrafted back into quartz gems. This allows XP farms to be built with relative ease, storing XP in item form, and without entities (mob farms). Compatible with latest Create update v6.0.10.

Curseforge link: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-quartz-to-experience
